agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The map for the Hampstead Garden Suburb Conservation Area was successfully matched using the 'Hampstead Garden Suburb' place name. The match produced a very high number of inliers (1649) and strong road name agreement (90%), confirming a precise location. Although the scale consistency was low (0.49), the extremely high inlier count indicates the affine transformation correctly absorbed the scale variation from the 1:10000 source map. The boundary was extracted from page 20.
